sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103684" key="tefrako/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεφρ-ᾰκός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n103684.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made from ashes</tr_>, of eye-salves, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰ σποδιακὰ καὶ τὰ τ. καλούμενα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:105" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.105</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (s. v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
